name: vtex-se-toolkit
description: Skills for the VTEX Solution Engineering team on Rocketlane pre-sales opportunities: weekly status digests, pipeline triage, discovery/solution-design briefs, POC readiness, logging English meeting notes (Granola/Read AI), and a status board to update project statuses. Cross-references Rocketlane with Slack, the VTEX account, and Atlas. Read-only by default; writes to Rocketlane only after explicit confirmation.
